title: Optimizing React Memoized Component Updates with Object Equality

statement.markdown: Write a function to optimize memoized component updates in React. The function should take an object of state updates and return the updated state. However, the current implementation has a logical bug that causes the component to re-render unnecessarily when the state object is updated with a new object reference, but the object itself remains unchanged. Fix this bug to ensure the component only re-renders when the state object changes.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an object of state updates, e.g. {name: 'John', age: 30}
statement.outputFormat: Output is the updated state object
statement.notes: The component should only re-render when the state object changes.

examples.explanation: New state object with changed name
New state object with same values

hints.text: Use the Object.is() method to compare object references.
